name: claude-hunterkit
description: 170 offensive security skills — web, API, AI, network, cloud, recon, auth. Bug bounty, red team, pentest.
author: claude-hunterKit
short_description: The largest open-source offensive security skill library. 170 skills, 1,770+ payload files, 51 web vuln types, 24 AI/LLM security skills.

skills.name: bugbounty-master
skills.description: Full bug bounty workflow: recon → hunt → chain → report

skills.name: web-sqli
skills.description: SQL injection — error, blind, time-based, OOB, all databases

skills.name: web-xss
skills.description: Cross-site scripting — stored, reflected, DOM, blind, CSP bypass

skills.name: web-ssrf
skills.description: SSRF — cloud metadata, IMDSv2, blind OOB, K8s pivot

skills.name: web-idor
skills.description: IDOR — horizontal, vertical, UUID, blind detection

skills.name: web-rce
skills.description: Remote code execution — all vectors, chaining methods

skills.name: api-bola
skills.description: Broken Object Level Authorization for APIs

skills.name: api-spec
skills.description: API specification ingestion and attack surface mapping

skills.name: ai-prompt-injection
skills.description: Prompt injection, jailbreaking, DAN roleplay, system prompt extraction

skills.name: ai-rag-poisoning
skills.description: RAG injection, vector database poisoning, document manipulation

skills.name: ai-agentic-attacks
skills.description: Goal hijacking, task chain manipulation, sub-agent confusion

skills.name: network-cloud
skills.description: Cloud security — AWS, Azure, GCP credential theft and escalation

skills.name: network-k8s
skills.description: Kubernetes attacks — API server, kubelet, RBAC, pod escape

skills.name: auth-jwt
skills.description: JWT attacks — alg:none, RS256→HS256, kid injection, JWK injection

skills.name: auth-oauth
skills.description: OAuth — redirect_uri bypass, PKCE bypass, state CSRF

skills.name: recon-osint
skills.description: OSINT methodology — domain recon, subdomain enum, JS analysis

skills.name: devtools-mcp
skills.description: Chrome DevTools MCP — browser automation for XSS, SSRF, OAuth

server.description: Browser automation for XSS verification, SSRF confirmation, OAuth interception

install_instructions.claude_code: claude mcp add claude-hunterkit npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.codex_cli: codex mcp add claude-hunterkit -- npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.gemini_cli: gemini mcp add claude-hunterkit npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
install_instructions.cursor: Add to cursor MCP config: npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
